title: centaurea jiroftensis
intro: Centaurea jiroftensis, also known as Jiroft knapweed or Jiroft centaury, is a plant species in the daisy family, Asteraceae, native to Iran. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Centaurea jiroftensis include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain and inflammation, and aid in wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
